arts.ttl: Josuha Guilavogui has already provided strong defence for under-fire Leeds United ace
arts.sum: Former Leeds striker Lee Chapman does think it’s a big issue for Joseph not finding goals consistently enough for a team like the Whites, as he spoke to the YEP : “I saw him last year at Chelsea in the fifth round of the FA Cup, and he scored two really well taken goals so he’s got the ability, but he’s got to do it more often when he’s playing for a team like Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Sheffield Wednesday insider's dressing room admission will have Leeds United sniffing blood
arts.sum: For a team sat four points off a play-off place and with so much to play for after making great strides on the pitch this season, you'd think Sheffield Wednesday would be going into tomorrow's match with Leeds United brimming with confidence and excited about the game ahead. A fans forum on Wednesday evening saw the Owls chairman expose a rift between him and manager Danny Rohl, with Chansiri claiming he had not been given a list o any transfers to make this January and saying there had been no communication between the pair since December.

arts.ttl: Pitfalls of January transfer pressure underlined by Leeds United’s rivals this week
arts.sum: Leeds United were the only side currently in the top four of the Championship that weren’t in the hunt for Tom Cannon from Leicester City, a signing that has its merits in the EFL but represents a highly-valued signing for those involved. Cannon so far has proven to be a strong Championship striker that’s worth his interest from Sheffield United and others, boasting nine goals this season, but the context behind them doesn’t suggest he’s a player worth committing £10million-plus to.

arts.ttl: Leeds’ Elland Road expansion: New progress details revealed
arts.sum: Leeds United’s Supporters’ Advisory Board meeting from December has revealed progress with plans to expand Elland Road to a 53,000-seat capacity. Any crumbs of insight into how close the club are to pushing through those plans is ideal for fans, which has come in the published minutes of the most recent Supporters’ Advisory Board meeting from December 9.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss gives Leeds United permission for Emi Buendia and Daniel Farke reunion
arts.sum: After Leeds United were told Emi Buendia would be their 'ideal' signing, manager Unai Emery has opened the door to the Argentine's January exit from Aston Villa. He would leave in a £33m deal for Villa, where he has suffered mixed injury fortunes, including a cruciate ligament problem that has meant he has not started a Premier League match in over 18 months.

arts.ttl: Bamford to Blackburn? Latest on Leeds transfer exit rumours
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford has always split opinion at Elland Road, with his quality there for many to see, but only when he stays fit enough to manage consistent performances, and links are formulating ahead of January. Here, we look at how much the striker is earning at the club, and whether a transfer away is being considered amid new links emerging…

arts.ttl: Protest planned for Leeds United and Sheffield Wednesday TV game as plan revealed
arts.sum: A group of Sheffield Wednesday supporters have announced plans to stage a protest inside Elland Road tomorrow ahead of their club's game against Leeds United . Writing on X, they said; First come first served on Sunday outside Elland Road, we’ll be handing them (flyer) out prior to kick off.

arts.ttl: Leeds United are going to need eye-watering bid to buckle to Saudi Arabia interest
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Willy Gnonto has reportedly become subject to interest from Saudi Arabian clubs this January window. There’s a few reasons at play here as to why Gnonto won’t be likely to leave Leeds during the January window, even for a move to the riches of Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Leeds United given greenlight by Nottingham Forest coach to secure transfer target
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest coach Andy Reid has suggested Andrew Omobamidele will be leaving the City Ground this January amid talk of a potential transfer to Leeds United or their promotion rivals Sheffield United. It now appears Omobamidele will definitely be on the move this month and available, with Reid suggesting a move needs to happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds United linked with surprise January transfer exit as Red Bull option emerges
arts.sum: His one-year deal expires in the summer and it is unlikely, due to his lack of minutes so far, that Farke will consider him in any potential squad planning for the 2025/26 season as the Whites target Premier League promotion. Like United, the Parisian side are under the Red Bull footballing banner which could make a deal easier to make as Paris FC hope to reach France's top-flight this season.
